title: Thai Crumble Mushroom Stir Fry
description: A simple Thai-inspired dish featuring crumbled mushrooms in a savory sauce, served over a bed of fluffy rice.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the soy sauce, honey, and Middle Eastern crumble. Cook for 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the Eastern crumble and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Remove from heat and stir in the sesame seeds and chopped cilantro.
Serve hot over a bed of fluffy rice.
Garnish with additional sesame seeds and chopped cilantro, if desired.
